title: Oracle LogMiner Events

classes.name: LogMinerEventRow
classes.description: Raw wrapper around a JDBC ResultSet row from Oracle LogMiner. Uses a flyweight pattern (single instance reused). 26 ResultSet column index constants.
methods: getSqlRedo(ResultSet): String [private, handles CSF continuation rows, max 25 continuations=100KB]

classes.name: LogMinerEvent
classes.description: Base class for all LogMiner events. Stores rowId as packed long via RowIdCodec, changeTime as epoch millis.
methods: LogMinerEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String rowId, String rsId, Instant changeTime)

classes.name: DmlEvent
classes.description: Data modification event (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE). Stores before/after column values from parsed DML.
methods: DmlEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String rowId, String rsId, Instant, Object[] oldValues, Object[] newValues)

classes.name: RedoSqlDmlEvent
classes.description: DmlEvent that additionally stores the raw LogMiner REDO SQL string.
methods: RedoSqlDmlEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String, String, Instant, Object[], Object[], String)

classes.name: TruncateEvent
classes.description: DML event for TRUNCATE TABLE operations. No additional fields.
methods: TruncateEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String, String, Instant, Object[], Object[])

classes.name: SelectLobLocatorEvent
classes.description: SEL_LOB_LOCATOR event - identifies which LOB column is being targeted for subsequent LOB operations.
methods: SelectLobLocatorEvent(LogMinerEventRow, LogMinerDmlEntry, String columnName, boolean binary)
SelectLobLocatorEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String, String, Instant, Object[], Object[], String, boolean)

classes.name: XmlBeginEvent
classes.description: Marks the start of an XML document in the event stream (XML_BEGIN, op code 68).
methods: XmlBeginEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String, String, Instant, Object[], Object[], String)

classes.name: ExtendedStringBeginEvent
classes.description: 32K_BEGIN event - start of extended string (>4K VARCHAR) operation (op code 91).
methods: ExtendedStringBeginEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String, String, Instant, Object[], Object[], String)

classes.name: LobWriteEvent
classes.description: LOB_WRITE operation (op code 10). Stores the binary/text data, offset, and length.
methods: LobWriteEvent(LogMinerEventRow, String data, int offset, int length)
LobWriteEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String, String, Instant, String, int, int)

classes.name: LobEraseEvent
classes.description: LOB_ERASE operation (op code 29). No additional fields beyond base LogMinerEvent.
methods: LobEraseEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String, String, Instant)

classes.name: XmlWriteEvent
classes.description: XML_WRITE operation (op code 70). Stores XML document content and length.
methods: XmlWriteEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String, String, Instant, String, Integer)

classes.name: XmlEndEvent
classes.description: XML_END operation (op code 71). Marks end of XML document. No additional fields.
methods: XmlEndEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String, String, Instant)

classes.name: ExtendedStringWriteEvent
classes.description: 32K_WRITE event (op code 92). Stores the extended string data chunk.
methods: ExtendedStringWriteEvent(EventType, Scn, TableId, String, String, Instant, String)

classes.name: EventType
classes.description: All supported Oracle LogMiner operation codes, resolved via static lookup array.
methods: from(int value): EventType [static, O(1) array lookup, returns UNSUPPORTED for unknown codes]

classes.name: RowIdCodec
classes.description: Packs/unpacks Oracle 18-char ROWID strings into 8-byte long using Oracle base64 alphabet (6 bits per char x 18 = 108 bits, fits in long).
methods: encode(String rowId): long [static, throws IllegalArgumentException if not 18 chars]

classes.name: LogMinerEventRowTooLargeException
classes.description: Thrown when a LogMiner row's SQL exceeds the maximum continuations limit (>100KB).
methods: LogMinerEventRowTooLargeException(String tableName, Long limitInKiloBytes, Scn scn)

key_relationships: LogMinerEventRow --uses--> RowIdCodec (indirectly; RowIdCodec used by LogMinerEvent constructors)
important_notes: No 'DdlEvent' class exists — DDL events use the base LogMinerEvent class with EventType.DDL(5).
No 'LogMinerEventProcessor' class/interface found in codebase — processing done in BufferedLogMinerStreamingChangeEventSource and TransactionCommitConsumer.
COMMIT(7) and ROLLBACK(36) also use base LogMinerEvent with no subclass.
LogMinerEventRow uses flyweight pattern: fromResultSet creates new instance but the method comment says single instance is reused in the calling loop.
rowId stored as packed long (108-bit Oracle base64 → long truncated to lower 64 bits) for memory efficiency in ehcache/infinispan buffering.
getSqlRedo handles multi-row continuation (CSF=1) — iterates ResultSet.next() inline; warns at 25 continuations (100KB), throws at Integer.MAX_VALUE rows.
Serialization adapters exist for both Ehcache and Infinispan for all event types (in buffered subpackages).
